name: Isaac Lab — LeIsaac
postCreateCommand: bash -c 'mkdir -p /groot_ws/src && ln -sfn /workspace/isaaclab /groot_ws/src/isaaclab && ln -sfn /workspace/leisaac /groot_ws/src/leisaac && LEISAAC=/workspace/leisaac && RELEASE=https://github.com/LightwheelAI/leisaac/releases/download/v0.1.0 && mkdir -p $LEISAAC/assets/robot $LEISAAC/assets/scenes && { [ -f $LEISAAC/assets/robot/so101_follower.usd ] && echo "robot usd already present" || curl -fL $RELEASE/so101_follower.usd -o $LEISAAC/assets/robot/so101_follower.usd; } && { [ -d $LEISAAC/assets/scenes/kitchen_with_orange ] && echo "scene already present" || { TMP=$(mktemp -d) && curl -fL $RELEASE/kitchen_with_orange.zip -o $TMP/k.zip && unzip -q $TMP/k.zip -d $LEISAAC/assets/scenes/ && rm -rf $TMP; }; }'
